motivation: Use one class-risk algorithm while permitting independently selected numeric magnitudes across datasets and tasks.

method.name: continuous_packet_flow_hierarchy_weighting
method.shared_algorithm_requirement: VPN and TLS use the same formula, loss topology, optimizer protocol, and candidate grid; only validation-selected alpha/gamma may differ.

launch_gate.condition: The validation-best eligible arm differs between VPN and TLS.
launch_gate.if_condition_false: Retain the validation-frozen common numeric reference and do not launch this followup.
launch_gate.if_condition_true: Implement the continuous formula, verify corner equivalence, and screen a fixed alpha/gamma grid on held-out validation only.
